title: PMSINT Fun & Unique Clear Red Plastic Bottle With Elf Head On Top & Flexistraw - 500 ml - Durable Material - Perfect for Kids
features: Elves Behavin' Badly Elf Drinking Bottle
Perfect Christmas Stocking Filler Gift For Kids / Children
description: With the brilliant elves behaving badly theme, this fantastic bottle is perfect as a stocking filler this Christmas. With it's flexistraw it's really handy to prevent any spillages and it's ideal for when your Children are out and about. It's perfect for keeping kids hydrated throughout the Christmas holidays and it can contain up to 450ml of fluid so that's more then enough to keep your children happy throughout the day.
